title: polystichum pungens
intro: Polystichum pungens, also known as the Japanese holly fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia, characterized by its dark green, lance-shaped fronds and distinctive black stems. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Polystichum pungens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Polystichum pungens typically involve steaming or drying the fronds, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications.
